measurement: AR range-dependent auto-aim core-hit rate (per normal shot)
focusReason: solo recording — Scarlet is the only unit, therefore the focus; her AR normal-attack popups are hers

clock.note: NOT a constant offset — the in-game countdown runs ~1.8% FAST relative to the recording clock, so the video->fight-clock offset DRIFTS from ~7s early to ~4s late. Best linear fit: fightClock = 1.018*videoSec - 7.18, i.e. videoSec = (fightClock + 7.18)/1.018. Band windows below were placed with this fit.

colourConvention: white number = NORMAL non-core; red + 'CORE HIT' text = core (may also carry an orange crit icon = core+crit, still counted core); orange number + crit icon (no 'CORE HIT') = crit non-core; classified by COLOUR only (per-band white value shifts with buff state, so value-banding across bands is invalid). EXCLUDED: her skill riders (~359k / ~717k / ~1.08M base, 283/565/848% coef) and burst-cast nuke; the persistent red laser TRACER beam; red circular impact rings on the boss body; red full-screen boss-AoE tint; reticle counters (0XX), red 00X boss-timer boxes, cyan BLOCK over character.

bands.confidence: medium (cores clearly present as red 197368 'CORE HIT'; count softened by reload gaps + popup overlap; ~+/-0.15)

bands.bossDistance: close / large apparent size, boss right (near1) then central-big/point-blank (near2) (matches 'near')
bands.coreRateNote: Cores confirmed by explicit 'CORE HIT' text + red ~140977 (= 2x the white 70488) in both near1 (v61) and near2 (v170) windows. Slight lower bound: red numbers vs the large dark boss body at point-blank are marginally harder to read than vs sky.
bands.confidence: medium (visibility bias + overlap on large near boss; ~+/-0.15)

bands.bossDistance: distant, boss small/centre (smallest apparent size of the fight) (matches 'far')
bands.confidence: high (numbers pop white/orange against grey sky even under red AoE tint; any red 'CORE HIT' would be obvious — none seen across both far windows + a high-zoom check at v75.5)

bands.bossDistance: medium-far, boss central (between mid and far apparent size) (matches 'midfar')
bands.coreRateNote: One ambiguous warm-toned number (~121123, v133) possibly core; everything else clearly white (91635) or orange crit (131538).
bands.confidence: high (essentially zero cores across both midfar windows)

method.countingRule: Popup-instance ratio: core & non-core NORMAL popups share identical on-screen lifetime, so summing red vs non-red damage NUMBERS across sampled frames gives an unbiased coreRate without deduping. Counted NUMBERS (not pixels) to avoid the red laser/impact-ring/AoE-tint confounds.
method.crop: unified boss/popup crop crop=950:460:1120:120 (covers the impact point across all bands, orig x 1120-2070); read at 2-3.2x zoom; contact sheets at fps 2 plus high-zoom single frames for colour disambiguation.
method.sheetsInScratchpad: scratchpad/scarlet/bands/{mid1,near_a,near_b,far_a,far_b,midfar_a,midfar_b}.png ; calibration frames scratchpad/scarlet/read/{z_20.5,z_20.83,big_25.0,conf_near61,conf_far75}.png (ephemeral — regenerate from windowVideoSec above).

summary.headline: Scarlet's AR auto-aim core rate is STRONGLY range-dependent and roughly binary: substantial when the boss is CLOSE (near ~0.44, mid ~0.30) and ~0 when the boss is FAR (midfar ~0.03, far 0.0). The single-bullet AR shows a much cleaner/larger core signal than Drake's 10-pellet SG (which diluted core across the spread to ~9% at best).
summary.mechanistic: The boss's core sits at the crosshair; a single AR bullet lands on-core only when the boss is close enough that the reticle is over the (small) core. Beyond ~mid range, auto-aim shots register on the body -> no core. Threshold falls between the 'mid' and 'midfar' bands.
confounds: FB/buff overlap ruled OUT as the driver: core appears in near1 (early) AND near2 (late), and is absent across ~70 far+midfar frames spanning fc 88-134 (any periodic FB there would have shown cores). So the signal tracks NEAR RANGE, not Full Burst.
Per-band white value shifts with buff state (mid/midfar 91635, near 70488, far 62922) — classification is colour-only, not value-based.
far_a and midfar_a windows straddle a band boundary (offset drift); the CLEAN windows far_b (fc 88-96) and midfar_b (fc 125-133) give the same 0-core result.
summary.rangeScriptCrossCheck: PASS — apparent boss size tracks the script on solo footage: largest/closest during near (v61, v170), smallest/most distant during far (v75-95), medium at mid (v21), medium-far at midfar (v124). The core-rate pattern independently corroborates the labels (cores appear in exactly the two closest bands).
summary.simRelevance: Engine AUTO_CORE_RATE is a flat 0.85 (calibrated, marked). For Scarlet's AR on this boss the observed rate is ~0.3-0.44 close and ~0 at range — a flat 0.85 over-credits far/midfar cores badly and slightly over-credits close-range. Supports a range-gated core model (core enabled only for near+mid). Single boss with a small core — do not over-generalise across bosses. Do NOT edit engine constants without owner review.
